name: lizards vs Slavs : Arena
short_description: The great Svyatoslav Igorevich was captured by the evil jackets, and now they force him to fight in the arena.
detailed_description:
These are lizards VS SLAVS: Arena




You are the great Slav that you were captured by the lizards, your goal is to go through the humiliating arena of death and stay alive. Eminent lizards use the most vile methods to continue the kind, and threaten the whole world, stop them.
Each wave is a battle with lizards or their evil invention (pod`s), from little to great the difficulty will increase, challenge yourself in this incredibly hardcore game. To defeat the evil lizards and get freedom or die in the absence of glory, everything is in your hands.



In the game it awaits you

  • increasing complexity of the game
  • Lizards of their variations as well as
  • The rolls of the lizards with which they mercilessly puff
  • Memes
  • Complex levels
  • Arena
  • Each phase is unique in its own way

gameplay


You are in service with 6 skills and 8 waves in order to try them on miserable lizards and their rolls, playing in the first person you need to clean the arena of evil spirits and then new horizons of waves will open for you.
